template_data.headline_html: What changes when you team smart.
template_data.image_prompt: Infographic before/after layout. Left panel dark navy, bold label 'BEFORE' with red X icon. Three short labels (3 words each): 'Zero federal refs', 'RFQs rejected them', 'Commercial ceiling'. Center: illustrated professional in business casual walking forward on upward path, arrow pointing right. Right panel cream/white, bold label 'AFTER' with green checkmarks. Three short labels: 'Three federal refs', 'Active as sub', 'GSA-ready'. Bold headline at top: 'NO PAST PERFORMANCE? TEAM FIRST.' Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
